name: Seven Deadly Sins: Isekai Adventure
description:
"You're not from around here, are you?"

You’ve been reincarnated into the world of the Seven Deadly Sins. With nothing but your modern-world knowledge and the powers defined in your persona, how will you survive the upcoming Holy War?

Meet iconic characters, master your magical abilities, and change the fate of Britannia.
